title: Saxifraga sommieri
taxonomy: Saxifraga sommieri is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Saxifragaceae. It belongs to the genus Saxifraga, which consists of approximately 500 species of rock saxifrages. The Saxifragaceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as saxifrages or rock saxifrages. This family is part of the order Saxifragales, which also includes other flowering plant families such as the Crassulaceae and the Paeoniaceae. Saxifraga sommieri is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia.
uses: Saxifraga sommieri, also known as Sommier's saxifrage, is an alpine plant native to the Himalayas.
